productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girl's Salome Blue Kidswear
description: Compositiontop: White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed pink crew neck, puffed mega sleeves with pink ribbed hem and with graphic on the front Bottom : Blue denim dungaree three tiered skirt made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, with patch pocket on the front, branded metal buttons, purple stitch detailing on the skirt ruffle hems and subliminal print on the fabric backing on topFittingRegular Waist - 61 cm Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Indulge your little one in happy feelings with this white tee and denim dungaree skirt combo from gini and jony. The "girls Longboard Surf Club" lettering on the chest infuses this top with the feel of childhood adventure. Team this with the dungaree bottoms and comfy crocs footwear for a happy, casual outing with her small buddies, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on her skin and keeps her fresh and comfortable all day.
